backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the loan document generator backend, handling user profiles, global and custom templates, document storage, and loan processing records with access control via mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the removal of the 'Loan Section Letter' document type from the frontend, listing affected files and components with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing their roles and the key changes made, such as removing 'Loan Section Letter' and adding PDF generation support.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a neutral light/dark color theme with sidebar and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app titled 'Loan Document Generator' that mounts the React root and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that manages form state, document generation/download/share flow, and wires together FormSection and template hooks inside a React Query provider.
frontend/src/components/FormSection.tsx: Loan form UI component with input fields, EMI auto-calculation, custom field management, and document generation buttons; 'Loan Section Letter' has been removed from the built-in document types list.
frontend/src/components/preview/Template: A React component that renders template overlay elements (background image, watermark, seal, signature) with absolute positioning on top of a document preview.
frontend/src/components/PreviewDialog.ts: A React dialog component that renders a formatted document preview with rich financial text highlighting (amounts, percentages, labels) and overlays template assets like watermarks, seals, and signatures.
frontend/src/components/TemplateDesigner: A React component providing a UI for designing and managing both built-in and custom document templates, supporting logo/seal/signature uploads, previewing, saving, and deleting templates.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and returns an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
A generic React hook that synchronizes a state value with localStorage, initializing from stored data and persisting updates automatically.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating custom templates on the ICP backend, including getAllTemplates, getCustomTemplateById, addCustomTemplate, and updateCustomTemplate with error handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useTemplates.ts: Custom React hook that manages both built-in and custom document templates, handling local state, localStorage persistence, and backend synchronization via React Query mutations. Includes serialization/deserialization helpers to store full Template objects as JSON inside a GlobalMasterTemplate backend type.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS entry point that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for a warm orange/amber color palette in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/download.ts: Utility function that triggers a browser file download by creating a temporary anchor element from a Blob URL.
frontend/src/lib/loan/calculateEmi.ts: Provides a function to calculate monthly EMI using the standard compound interest formula and a helper to format numbers as Indian Rupee currency strings.
frontend/src/lib/pdf/generatePdf.ts: Generates a minimal valid PDF file by rendering a document to a canvas as JPEG and embedding it into a hand-crafted raw PDF structure without any external PDF library.
frontend/src/lib/pdf/layout.ts: Defines A4 page dimension constants at 96 DPI, including margins, header height, footer height, and the resulting content area rectangle.
frontend/src/lib/pdf/renderDocumentToCan: Renders a complete document page onto an HTML Canvas by compositing a Bajaj Finance header image, footer image, optional watermark, optional background image, and the template's text content.
frontend/src/lib/shareUtils.ts: Utility that attempts to share a PDF Blob via the Web Share API and returns a boolean indicating whether sharing was initiated or a download fallback is needed.
frontend/src/lib/templateAssets/fileToDa: Converts an image File object to a base64 data URL using FileReader, rejecting non-image files.
frontend/src/lib/templateAssets/position: Provides helpers to convert a PositionPreset enum value into CSS style properties or canvas pixel coordinates for positioning elements like logos or QR codes.
frontend/src/lib/templates/getTemplate.t: Defines the built-in document templates (Loan Approval Letter, TDS Deduction Intimation, GST Letter) with their default body text and exposes functions to retrieve, normalize, and persist templates via localStorage.
frontend/src/lib/templates/renderTemplat: Renders a document template by replacing placeholder tokens (e.g., {{name}}, {{loanAmount}}) in headline and body strings with actual form data values, including custom fields.
frontend/src/lib/validation.ts: Validates loan form data, returning an array of error messages for missing or invalid fields like name, loan amount, interest rate, year, and processing charge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/types/form.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and types for form data, including CustomField, LoanType union, FormData, and DocumentType.
frontend/src/types/templates.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for template configuration, including background, watermark, seal, signature settings, and the core Template and CustomTemplate types.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme tokens (colors via OKLCH, fonts, border radius, animations) and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state and feature requests, currently focused on removing the 'Loan Section Letter' document type from both the frontend and backend.
